chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. D- 3626 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 10.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Zahid Hussain Mallah, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ghulam Hussain Sangi, Asstt: A.G. along with P.I Syed Manzoor Ali for SSP Hyderabad & SIP Noor Muhammad for DIGP Hyderabad Learned A.A.G. files statement on behalf of respondent Nos. 2 and 3 which is taken on record; copy whereof supplied to the counsel for petitioner. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that the alleged detainee namely Niaz Hussain son of Wahid Bux has already been released by respondent No.4 and at present the petitioner has no grievance, therefore, he prays for disposal of this petition. In view of above, this petition stands disposed of having achieved its purpose. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
